# JavBus Fixtures

Fixtures must not contain usernames, passwords, cookies, tokens, private
messages, account-specific data, or private URLs.

If a fixture is captured from a logged-in session, redact sensitive values
before saving it here. Keep only the anonymous Discuz XHTML structure needed by
parser tests: forum links, thread links, pagination, post containers, image
tags, attachment links, empty pages, permission messages, and challenge pages.

The initial fixtures in this directory are synthetic samples. Real JavBus XHTML
fixtures are still required before claiming full parser verification.
